summary: Plasiyer Smart Order Debug UI Batch testing completed successfully. All new features working correctly including mini summary, expandable debug panel, null-safe fallback labels, and mobile viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Order Debug UI Batch verified. Key findings: 1) Plasiyer login works with sf_plasiyer/plasiyer123. 2) Smart Orders page loads correctly at /seftali/sales/warehouse-draft endpoint. 3) Product card shows mini summary (HIZLI BAKIŞ) with: Günlük tüketim, Trend, Son öneri. 4) 'Detayları Gör' toggle expands/collapses debug panel. 5) Debug panel has 5 sections: Tüketim, Rota, Multiplier, Hesap, SKT. 6) Null-safe fallback labels work correctly: 'Veri yok' for missing rate/values, 'Yetersiz veri' for missing confidence, 'Hesaplanamadı' for missing trend. 7) Excluded items badge only shows when data.excluded_items has items (currently empty in test data). 8) No new endpoints introduced - uses existing /api/seftali/sales/warehouse-draft response. 9) Mobile viewport renders correctly with stacked layout. 10) Submit button 'Depoya Sipariş Gönder' still visible and functional.

frontend_tests.summary_cards: PASS - Rut Müşterisi, Sipariş Veren, Taslakta cards visible
frontend_tests.mini_summary_visible: PASS - HIZLI BAKIŞ section with Günlük tüketim, Trend, Son öneri
frontend_tests.mini_summary_fallbacks: PASS - Shows 'Veri yok' for missing rate, 'Hesaplanamadı' for missing trend
frontend_tests.debug_toggle_expands: PASS - Panel expands on click, text changes to 'Detayları Gizle'
frontend_tests.debug_toggle_collapses: PASS - Panel collapses on second click
frontend_tests.debug_panel_tuketim_section: PASS - Tüketim section with Günlük tüketim, Kaynak, Güven, Trend
frontend_tests.debug_panel_rota_section: PASS - Rota section with Son teslimat, Bugün, Sonraki rota, Gün farkı
frontend_tests.debug_panel_multiplier_section: PASS - Multiplier section with Weekly multiplier, Kaynak
frontend_tests.debug_panel_hesap_section: PASS - Hesap section with Ham ihtiyaç, Son ihtiyaç
frontend_tests.debug_panel_skt_section: PASS - SKT section with Raf ömrü, Coverage, Clamp, Max safe qty, Not
frontend_tests.null_safe_veri_yok: PASS - 'Veri yok' shown for missing values
frontend_tests.null_safe_yetersiz_veri: PASS - 'Yetersiz veri' shown for missing confidence
frontend_tests.excluded_items_badge: INFO - Not visible (excluded_items empty in current data, expected behavior)
frontend_tests.mobile_viewport_layout: PASS - Summary cards stack vertically, content readable
frontend_tests.mobile_mini_summary: PASS - Mini summary visible on mobile
frontend_tests.mobile_debug_panel: PASS - Debug panel renders correctly on mobile

verified_requirements.excluded_items_badge_behavior: Shows only when excluded_items exists and has items
